headline: Verizon Wins Injunction As Truthful Advertising Takes Center Stage
summary: A US federal judge granted Verizon (NYSE:VZ) a preliminary injunction against T-Mobile over advertising that the court called "literally false." The ruling centers on comparative savings claims in T-Mobile's marketing that referenced Verizon and other rivals. The decision restricts certain T-Mobile ads while the underlying case continues to move through the courts. The outcome highlights how legal scrutiny of marketing practices can affect competition among major US wireless carriers. For...
